backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user registration/login with phone numbers, balance management (myDailys, rewards, available, tit, ben), transaction history, and access control integration with validation for balance ranges (0-999,999,999).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four completed features related to the floating action button: doubling its size, making it circular, fixing logo proportions, and adding elegant visual styling with shadows and animations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, contexts, and utilities with detailed specifications for layouts, spacing, typography, and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component-specific tokens using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title "Mi Daily", and script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, splash screen logic, authentication guards, route definitions (login, password, dashboard, transactions), and query client integration for cache management.
frontend/src/components/AvailableCard.ts: Balance card displaying available DLY amount with COP indicator and USD conversion, featuring yellow accent border, Colombian number formatting, and click-to-edit modal functionality.
frontend/src/components/BalanceEditModal: Modal dialog for editing individual balance values (myDailys, rewards, available) with validation for range 0-999,999,999 and integration with useBalances hook's updateSingleBalance function.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom navigation bar with Home, Movements, and Profile tabs using TanStack Router for navigation and highlighting active tab based on current path.
Header component displaying the Daily logo and a toggle button to show/hide balance visibility using Eye/EyeOff icons.
frontend/src/components/FloatingActionBu: Floating action button (FAB) that opens a TransferModal when clicked, styled with a yellow gradient and Daily logo.
frontend/src/components/LoginIllustratio: Simple component that renders a static login illustration image from assets.
frontend/src/components/MyDailysCard.tsx: Card displaying the user's main DLY balance along with TIT and BEN sub-balances, clickable to open a BalanceEditModal.
frontend/src/components/RewardsCard.tsx: Card showing the user's rewards balance in DLY, clickable to open a BalanceEditModal for editing.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Splash screen component that displays a full-screen image with an optional fallback continue button after 4 seconds.
frontend/src/components/TotalInWallets.t: Card displaying the total DLY balance across all wallets with USD conversion at a fixed rate of 0.000248.
frontend/src/components/TransactionListI: List item component rendering a single transaction with icon, direction (sent/received), amount, and timestamp details.
frontend/src/components/TransferModal.ts: Modal dialog for transferring DLY to another user by phone number, with validation, error handling, and success feedback.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: Authentication context providing login, register, logout functions with localStorage persistence and auto-login on mount.
frontend/src/context/BalanceVisibilityCo: Context for managing global balance visibility state (show/hide) with a toggle function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication with Internet Identity and admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useBalances.ts: React hook that fetches and updates user balances from the backend actor, with authentication checks, error handling, and query invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout, managing identity state, and handling delegation validity with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransactionHistory: React hook that fetches transaction history for a given user ID using the backend actor with retry logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransfer.ts: React hook for transferring funds between users via phone number, with error transformation and automatic query invalidation for balances and transactions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom dark theme color variables, base styles, and splash screen animation keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying user balances, dailys, rewards, and available funds with loading/error states and bottom navigation.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login/registration page with phone number input, country code selector, and mode toggle that navigates to password page.
frontend/src/pages/PasswordPage.tsx: Password entry page for both login and registration flows with validation, confirmation field for new accounts, and authentication submission.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: React page component that displays a user's transaction history with loading, error, and empty states, using a sticky header, transaction list items, and bottom navigation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural notes, known issues (deformed Daily logo), and feature requests to improve the send money floating action button by making it circular, doubling its size, fixing logo proportions, and adding elegant styling.
